issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Device or router settings
DNS server: | AdGuard DNS Default server
System version: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
Browser: | Chrome

comment.body:
안녕하세요, 이슈 제보자입니다. log.onmas.kt.com은 대한민국 통신사 중 하나인 KT(kt.com)의 하위 도메인으로, 서비스 운영에 필요한 로그 수집 도메인입니다. 광고나 개인정보 추적 목적이 아닙니다.
이 도메인이 차단되면 유튜브에 업로드된 영상처럼 네트워크에러가 발생하여 SNS ID 관리 기능에서 오류가 생깁니다.

AdGuard가 아닌 다른 블록리스트에서도 차단되고 있다고 하셨는데, 정확히 어떤 필터 리스트에서 차단되고 있는지 알 수 있을까요? 또한 서비스 필수 도메인인 만큼 화이트리스트 등록이 가능한지 검토 부탁드립니다.

### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드

issue.title: Fix #227109 endfield.gryphline.com Annoyances – cookie notice

comment.body:
> https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/pull/227111#pullrequestreview-3951427041: Did you check [endfield.gryphline.com/en-us/protocol/privacy_policy](https://endfield.gryphline.com/en-us/protocol/privacy_policy) 


@piquark6046 Thanks for checking again, it doesn't work on the cookiesPolicy page with the widely `div:has(a` selector. 

```diff
- endfield.gryphline.com##body > div:has(a[href$="/cookiesPolicy"])
+ endfield.gryphline.com##body > div[class*=" "]:has(> div > span > a[href$="/cookiesPolicy"])
```

I will change the rule based on Alex's comment, because it works.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://dzen.ru/a/Zwd-U5-Zuw8_lE5w](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdzen.ru%2Fa%2FZwd-U5-Zuw8_lE5w) ### Comment > 1) Яндекс браузер. > 2) Windows 7 Home 64x > 3) Adguard Антибаннер + Adguard Extra > 4) Сайты яндекс и яндекс дзен > > В браузере Opera Adguard спокойно справляется и без Extra - на яндексе нет никакой рекламы. Также там доступны больше граф с блоками и фильтров - яндекс браузер, наверное, режет их количество, что сказывается на невозможности заблокировать их на своих сайтах, площадках. Какие бы блокираторы рекламы не пробовал (около 8) и как бы чего не настраивал - реклама на яндексе отключалась лишь однажды,а потом снова начала включаться. Такая задачка, просьба помочь её решить - реклама там сильно раздражает,а блогом и поиском приходится пользоваться. > ``` Username: @RussianOrthodox63 ``` ### Screenshots

### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)

> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.

comment.body:
@hj0210 제보하신 초기에는 KT Android 앱에서의 특정 기능 오류와 관련된 문제로 이해되어 확인을 계획하고 있었습니다.

다만 전체 도메인(`log.onmas.kt.com`)의 차단 해제를 오늘 요청하고 계시는데요, 이 경우에는 기존 이슈의 범위를 벗어난 요청으로 판단됩니다.

해당 도메인이 실제로 기능 오류의 직접적인 원인인지, 그리고 어떤 규칙 또는 환경에서 차단이 발생하는지에 대한 확인이 필요하며, 이러한 정보 없이 저희 측에서 전체 허용 처리를 진행하기는 어렵습니다.

앞서 요청드린 재현 방법 및 로그 정보를 제공해 주시면, 해당 문제 범위 내에서 검토를 이어가겠습니다.

### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401

>

> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.

I’ll check other pages later. I’m feeling unwell right now.

issue.title: Possible false positive: static2.manualslib.com blocked by AdGuard DNS
issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

static2.manualslib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Hello AdGuard Team,

It appears that the domain static2.manualslib.com is currently blocked by AdGuard DNS.

This domain is used as a static CDN resource for the website manualslib.com, which hosts user manuals and documentation for various devices. The blocked domain serves images, scripts, and other static assets required for the normal operation of the website.

DNS trace result:

dig +trace static2.manualslib.com

Result:

static2.manualslib.com. 1200 IN CNAME cdn50181425.ahacdn.me.


dig static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
Result:
; <<>> DiG 9.10.6 <<>> static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
;; global options: +cmd
;; Got answer:
;; ->>HEADER<<- opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 12142
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 1, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version: 0, flags:; udp: 4096
; OPT=15: 00 11 ("..")
;; QUESTION SECTION:
;static2.manualslib.com.		IN	A

;; ANSWER SECTION:
static2.manualslib.com.	3600	IN	A	0.0.0.0

;; Query time: 98 msec
;; SERVER: 94.140.14.14#53(94.140.14.14)
;; WHEN: Fri Mar 06 15:07:53 MSK 2026
;; MSG SIZE  rcvd: 73


Because of this block, users who use AdGuard DNS may experience incomplete page loading or missing static content on manuals pages.

Could you please review this domain and verify whether it was blocked intentionally?  
If this is a false positive, we would appreciate removing it from the DNS filter.

Thank you for your time and for maintaining the filter lists.

Best regards

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do

> ▼

>

> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.

@hj0210 We need steps to reproduce. I tried to log in with invalid credentials, and the process not failed. In this case we cannot unblock it, because users use our DNS to reduce tracking.
We also have non-filtering DNS, it does not block ads and tracking.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: mykadri.tv
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Ads) [https://mykadri.tv](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fmykadri.tv) ### Comment > Hello AdGuard Team, > > I am an active AdGuard user from Georgia. Currently many regional advertising domains used on Georgian websites are not included in the standard AdGuard filter lists, which allows a large amount of ads to bypass blocking. > > Because of this, I maintain my own constantly updated blocklist where I add new advertising domains, trackers, and scripts that appear on Georgian streaming and media websites. I use this list on all my devices through AdGuard. > > I would like to request that you review and possibly integrate my blocklist into your filtering system or regional filters so that other AdGuard users in Georgia can benefit from improved ad blocking. > > My blocklist is regularly updated and maintained here: > https://github.com/balisticbase/GIORGI/blocklist > > Key points: > * The list focuses on ad networks and redirect scripts commonly used on Georgian streaming websites. > * It includes domains, CDN endpoints, and tracking scripts that are currently not covered by existing AdGuard filters. > * The list is continuously updated as new advertising sources appear. > > Georgia currently does not have a dedicated regional filter, and many ads used on local websites bypass standard filters. Adding support for Georgian advertising sources or integrating this list would significantly improve protection for users in the region. > > Thank you for your work and for considering this request. > > Best regards ``` Username: @GIORGI ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
@flavus-mab Hi! I can't check this on my end - the website is not available. Is it related to filters or other modules?
First, please do the following:
1. Leave only these AdGuard filters
    ```
    AdGuard Base
    AdGuard Mobile Ads
    AdGuard Tracking Protection
    AdGuard URL Tracking
    AdGuard Social Media
    AdGuard Popups
    AdGuard Mobile App Banners
    AdGuard Other Annoyances
    AdGuard Cookie Notices
    AdGuard German
    ```
2. Disable other modules
3. Reproduce the problem
4. If you get it, try to disable them one by one to find the problematic one
5. Write which one causes it here.

labels.name: T: Anti Adblock Script
labels.description: The site detects ad blocking

labels.name: Extra

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
This issue is known to be solved with [AdGuard Extra](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra) userscript.

If you’re using AdGuard for Windows, Mac or Android, please make sure that AdGuard Extra is enabled in the application settings.

If you’re using AdGuard Browser Extension, we suggest installing AdGuard Extra in addition to it.

* [Install for Chrome, Edge or other Chromium-based browsers](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Install for Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

comment.body:
> Один из фильтров ломает чат Twitch. Размер чата становится непропорционально большим по отношению ко всей странице трансляции. Это происходит на всех страницах Twitch. С выключенным AdGuard все приходит в норму. Проверьте и скорректируйте настройки фильтров. Спасибо!

Caused by `Web Annoyances Ultralist`

@LanikSJ Hi. This rule is the reason (the width of the chat window increases)

`twitch.tv#$#.bBgSPF { overflow: auto !important; }`

issue.title: Possible false positive: static2.manualslib.com blocked by AdGuard DNS

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

static2.manualslib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Hello AdGuard Team,

It appears that the domain static2.manualslib.com is currently blocked by AdGuard DNS.

This domain is used as a static CDN resource for the website manualslib.com, which hosts user manuals and documentation for various devices. The blocked domain serves images, scripts, and other static assets required for the normal operation of the website.

DNS trace result:

dig +trace static2.manualslib.com

Result:

static2.manualslib.com. 1200 IN CNAME cdn50181425.ahacdn.me.


dig static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
Result:
; <<>> DiG 9.10.6 <<>> static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
;; global options: +cmd
;; Got answer:
;; ->>HEADER<<- opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 12142
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 1, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version: 0, flags:; udp: 4096
; OPT=15: 00 11 ("..")
;; QUESTION SECTION:
;static2.manualslib.com.		IN	A

;; ANSWER SECTION:
static2.manualslib.com.	3600	IN	A	0.0.0.0

;; Query time: 98 msec
;; SERVER: 94.140.14.14#53(94.140.14.14)
;; WHEN: Fri Mar 06 15:07:53 MSK 2026
;; MSG SIZE  rcvd: 73


Because of this block, users who use AdGuard DNS may experience incomplete page loading or missing static content on manuals pages.

Could you please review this domain and verify whether it was blocked intentionally?  
If this is a false positive, we would appreciate removing it from the DNS filter.

Thank you for your time and for maintaining the filter lists.

Best regards

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
Hi!

> Because of this block, users who use AdGuard DNS may experience incomplete page loading or missing static content on manuals pages.

Please provide the URL where you notice the incorrect blocking.

issue.body:
# Creating the pull request

> Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed\
> If the related issue does not exist in our repository, please create it before making pull request\
> It is highly recommended to use our [Web Reporting Tool](https://kb.adguard.com/technical-support/reporting-tool) instead of creating an issue on GitHub directly\
> Please note, that we verify every pull request manually, so it may take time to apply it

## Prerequisites

### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms

- [x] This is not an ad/bug report;
- [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project;
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes;
- [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure.

## What problem does the pull request fix?

### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section

- [ ] Missed ads or ad leftovers;
- [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly;
- [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website;
- [ ] Missed analytics or tracker;
- [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc;
- [ ] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc;
- [x] Filters maintenance.

## What issue is being fixed?
Turns out they have a few other domains.
Currently, they all redirect to the current one. However, this update is to ensure the rules remain effective if they switch to one of the others.

Examples:
```
Nepu.net
Nepu.io
Nepu.xyz
Nepu.cc
Nepu.beer
Nepu.移动
```
### Enter the issue address

Fix #227220

### Terms

- [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

comment.body: The point of this pull request was to future proof the rule, since they clearly have other domains even if they are not currently using them.

issue.title: Possible false positive: static2.manualslib.com blocked by AdGuard DNS

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

static2.manualslib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Hello AdGuard Team,

It appears that the domain static2.manualslib.com is currently blocked by AdGuard DNS.

This domain is used as a static CDN resource for the website manualslib.com, which hosts user manuals and documentation for various devices. The blocked domain serves images, scripts, and other static assets required for the normal operation of the website.

DNS trace result:

dig +trace static2.manualslib.com

Result:

static2.manualslib.com. 1200 IN CNAME cdn50181425.ahacdn.me.


dig static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
Result:
; <<>> DiG 9.10.6 <<>> static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
;; global options: +cmd
;; Got answer:
;; ->>HEADER<<- opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 12142
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 1, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version: 0, flags:; udp: 4096
; OPT=15: 00 11 ("..")
;; QUESTION SECTION:
;static2.manualslib.com.		IN	A

;; ANSWER SECTION:
static2.manualslib.com.	3600	IN	A	0.0.0.0

;; Query time: 98 msec
;; SERVER: 94.140.14.14#53(94.140.14.14)
;; WHEN: Fri Mar 06 15:07:53 MSK 2026
;; MSG SIZE  rcvd: 73


Because of this block, users who use AdGuard DNS may experience incomplete page loading or missing static content on manuals pages.

Could you please review this domain and verify whether it was blocked intentionally?  
If this is a false positive, we would appreciate removing it from the DNS filter.

Thank you for your time and for maintaining the filter lists.

Best regards

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition
